titleZh: 全球并购：中外公司法差异梳理
titleEn: Global M&A – Know the Differences Between PRC and Foreign Company Law
abstractZh: 从董事职责、治理结构与股东权利三个维度比较中外公司制度差异，兼及中国公司法修订后实务衔接要点。
abstractEn: Compares PRC company-law structures with common-law approaches for transaction and governance design, with practical pointers for cross-border M&A work.
